exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your marathon training forward
items: Establish a consistent base running routine of 20-30 minutes, 3-4 times per week for 4 consecutive weeks
Establish proper running form and cadence by recording yourself running and analyzing your stride mechanics
Create a weekly base-building schedule that gradually increases your running volume by no more than 10% each week for the next 8 weeks
Complete a basic running assessment to determine your current fitness level and running experience
Invest in properly fitted running shoes from a specialty store with gait analysis to prevent injury during high-mileage training
Research and select a specific marathon race that aligns with your timeline and goals
